textByHash.01960bb8535f1ebf6cf803335b683a3dbc618f6f: This shady fellow is a member of the Zamorakian Magical Institute.
textByHash.05b2475e5c69652e0ca16f072543e8d97a863ccc: Well, they are standard equipment for any slayer looking to kill Banshees...
textByHash.063df16c394f889149a683c1c81ec27e7774fe18: Once freed, the Temple Knights pursued a great crusade to destroy the Mother Mallum. Unfortunately, she was too powerful and the best they could do was to trap her inside a mystical prison.
textByHash.0850fb8a7406ffb42a1852a3fe147511e8b75de5: Let's see if I grabbed anything useful from him while he was teleporting...
textByHash.099cd2d6bc37ba9278ed17600929e125cafbfac1: I think we finally have him!
textByHash.09e3671eba246e0f78275cc5bd4c8b84c5f4b6ef: I have always had a gift for magic, and have spent most of my life trying to find applications for it that would serve our order and give us an edge over our opponents.
textByHash.0a3797f24372e14195da0f76675e65259d770921: I've cross-referenced the name Mahey'ish Medron with some other texts and been able to piece together some of the history.
textByHash.0b9cf6b790e3d0f87ee4ec073d3daa7b41d28552: It is far too dangerous. In my example I only used two places, but in practice there is a third place involved. It is a strange, empty dimension that teleports seem to pass through.
textByHash.0ba4178a6f5fc43ec83f9c537dfbf50cffbf810c: No! Hang on, I wasn't finished.
textByHash.0c9d741cc66c02c85f1c0d496022875340914f81: Background magical levels all seem within normal tolerable limits Player...
textByHash.0d7cadd40d74abdece35d9fc18e9447ba74ef1d9: The who? I've never heard of them before...
textByHash.0e54d9e5c41b5b914ce0c1a0d00551129046ce57: There doesn't seem to be anything unusual about these readings Player... Looks like your hunch was wrong. Savant out.
textByHash.1104cdac76b980bd55858d0002a3de0c7c4a24c9: Only what is already available through your CommOrb I'm afraid. I'm currently collating a lot of other data pertaining to Witchaven. I'll keep you updated if anything turns up.
textByHash.1480a558c35f781e69deb6f32cdb018c072785bf: Don't worry about it , he may have escaped AGAIN, but I still have him on my tracking spell...
textByHash.1610f932a51666feeec52d919cd937527947ef75: Well, you are not officially a full fledged Temple Knight now, are you Initiate ?
textByHash.1677a614fb819326e48d697f6df7992128a14e29: Let me give you an example: If you were in Falador castle, and wished to teleport to Varrock, then you could use this 'slow-teleport' technique to be in both places simultaneously, but invisible to anyone in either.
textByHash.17851e7488b2cdce4b82e4c6d0ee8f3e97fd8f40: From your perspective you can see three places simultaneously, and can choose to move between all three at will!
textByHash.1c0576c0164fcfbbf5d3ee9b1d50944be611b93a: All who dwelled in his lands knew that the Temple Knights were the honoured, the blessed, the personally chosen warriors of Saradomin, and thus were they given great freedom and authority in all of our Lords lands.
textByHash.1d18999a255547a125aa95e13822dcf116cb6014: Record one is from a routine monitoring of Lord Daquarius.
textByHash.21648bad42b7eea6610585d320dae9f8f877d793: We also suspect that they have been responsible for a number of thefts of a mysterious rock that the Wizards Tower has started producing, but don't have much intelligence about that.
textByHash.2187de88d73413642e88adb3ca4d9dac7df8cfa8: Nope... I'm not picking up anything unusual near here... Savant out.
textByHash.22488b911d8125e455f28388620f70c1e7542455: Needless to say, in our line of work this could come in very handy for sneaking around unobserved...
textByHash.230d0da210c10fa3de56ef0b99b97aaa10488f66: Just follow your orders and continue the chase, and his days are numbered.
textByHash.2352b4e3fb502fa76a7a58b90bd55220abc4a1c0: Well, this isn't the first time the Temple Knights have encountered the Mother Mallum.
textByHash.28a3ae94377681d6b06d95e58aff0dfdf000716a: Take him out now! This might be your only chance!
textByHash.2c1304ec73c34ce88b6777b90c0ba25511c137e3: Nope, all clear here. Savant out.
textByHash.2c8a78c69a8878d563b5daa0e77ac8f85b194c31: Not picking up any unusual readings here, Player... Savant out.
textByHash.2d83d710778e26a951676eb2c9f2ecab0fc75bf5: Scan results are negative, Player. Savant out.
textByHash.2e83fcfc5fdcc308c3209c17d38947e866cc0a9e: Yes, it is, but back to the task at hand. I suggest you head to the next subject of our observations, he might be more help in locating Solus.
textByHash.2f99e3bf663ee2d4a049b1ec73cc12b1be1be68e: The spell is still running, wait a moment... There!
textByHash.302888ca9c54273e1b8fd9b0952f81b6041fa3bc: I think you're in the wrong place. Savant out.
textByHash.3216844d14ab8442451c95dec5eb3f3a672a04c2: No, this is a very specific worm that is only found in one place...
textByHash.32a418baf13828fe04d87661f2251f581c8c55ac: You're going to have to find some other way to intimidate him into giving you the information we need.
textByHash.3337dacf505dfba4a2b0804418f50683ec047031: But keep chasing him, together we are going to bring him to justice!
textByHash.33d77a5778f2ea115ee93493fd739f26b87e31fd: I thought we'd lost you there for a moment.
textByHash.3507729d1128038968e61eb915ea83b7aaa361ea: I've seen this design of beard before... But I cannot remember where...
textByHash.3669a1c0a76da842371aefbb6c547b4cdfb81469: There are many factions in these lands, some almost as magically advanced and organised as ourselves!
textByHash.36e1d11ff2f71fb012257585b1154768a2026004: Okay, I am attempting to block his teleport...
textByHash.392a2e991e6f0aa5e54f4a21320624f5848eb14a: Go and take it to Sir Amik so that he can make you a full-fledged White Knight!
textByHash.3a0a7b142eec46c2647976f9a526b1233a1e89d9: In case you haven't heard of him, he is the leader of the Kinshra, also known as Black Knights.
textByHash.3a3efba20b89c0605f9a1e52d5bf1bcc61ba6503: Centuries ago we discovered that a great evil had taken control of some of the most influential people in the world.
textByHash.3bfeea47fa9f507279fb564db37f610d28431090: Well I still don't know what help that is, but if you have an idea here he might be you should head there immediately!
textByHash.3ca44665e783423b13d4e92723d2e701595bb9bb: It is a constant struggle to keep our operatives with advanced magical equipment that our opponents don't have - this is why we have the self-destruct safeguards, to prevent our equipment ever falling into unfriendly hands.
textByHash.3d1f2302aef442fceefc9f1ad43d25fa230e8dcf: Frankly, the human mind isn't equipped to cope with processing so much information simultaneously, and the test subjects started to display... behavioral problems...
textByHash.3d87900df5b4f4c718855b58e739b3494852b2d8: The answer is probably contained within those strange glyphs.
textByHash.3fa24e771979b5ced91efbe94d8b6837d802baa4: You're lucky I think, readings show it was highly poisonous!
textByHash.4088cf3df22b603f30025dd03be6dd897940692e: The background magical levels are slightly above average here, but not enough to signify anything.
textByHash.4131372bf1977ee277d23a335ba15f395dc6ae94: The Library tells me that we have two visual recordings from SpyOrbs available to you, as well as a standard dossier.
textByHash.414d842d3465cb97e05c9e5bd09d62aa10ac267d: Luckily the Temple Knights are far more open minded about things, and I really feel like my work is making a difference to them!
textByHash.42bf514b92cc6224fa9d5f3a7ffb59008f0b960d: VERY well done. Very well done indeed.
textByHash.437c826728f43e93978348d5c64730002df7272f: , I want you to search for him, and use your Comm-Orb to scan for him if you think he is nearby!
textByHash.44f217c6aeb864b6cf7548f31048af4398057965: I'm sorry, I don't know. Maybe somewhere where hats like this are common?
textByHash.47c8779b843896b8fb10fcb15b1a96f5be450a35: Well, lucky for you, my preliminary sea slug analysis has just finished.
textByHash.48f42c8752efdf8bbfd41194f61273b2174ddf00: That is usually the case, yes, I agree. Well, let's see if I remember how this goes... 'Legends tell us that Lord Saradomin once walked these lands amongst us, and delivered his wisdom unto us personally, so that we could grow wise in his honour.
textByHash.4b268ddf7a5ac9f010eb3e294940bf6a0913a2b5: Although, to be fair he does tend to get a bit obsessive at times.
textByHash.4c187499c29ed6e0b251f3f63395e202b18e3305: That great evil was the Mother Mallum.
textByHash.5027293728fa2cab2d7455951a0a321dbcf1eebb: No... it is not exactly the same...
textByHash.519a9027b8b40fb774be777d38fbd0f41423857d: Something like that I think, it's been a long time since I heard it last...
textByHash.535703787c75a9e385ad8b3a40d85f90a0f61d13: I thought so. Those glyphs look similar to some ancient Saradomin runes I studied at the academy.
textByHash.54ae68e15a0ca82c14ec6a4fe496b7783017eb5b: I would suggest the people that the SpyOrbs were observing, when they picked up records of Solus, would be a good place to start your investigation.
textByHash.5644b251733eed1d0a4db5b73aa793002c95a502: , are you okay? Speak to me!
textByHash.581a0917fb05d349c3589ff111deca52aa7e1bce: You will need to find someone who has years of experience in aquatic cooking or it could go horribly wrong.
textByHash.58c49ff469ced6a24ee470e1d44d2469b082c228: Let's worry about that later; Go get Solus!
textByHash.5ab6f611cc1a8929ef8644b1b65e2ab07bf2892b: Uh. Tell him that you're working for a wizard who's sending you telepathic instructions.
textByHash.5db8a4a110647af2a391c15d7388597b781824b7: Don't worry , I am reconfiguring your CommOrb to compensate for any camouflage magics.
textByHash.5ea0e86902f02528285b33339508160e10389dc2: Right, the best thing we can do then is to repair or reenforce it before she escapes.
textByHash.6013c67d2c72d6f6d526c00b64049c17cb9eae48: But he can't run forever, and every time he tries something against you, I can update your CommOrb to prevent it.
textByHash.60a5b119e47db262e120e2e6a4fdd7b42a2fc910: Still no harm done, I guess! Call me if you need me!
textByHash.6101aba445df927e643fb3fc884e3222bc9dd2a9: So what do you think? Pretty nifty little piece of kit this crystal, huh?
textByHash.615986a1f0d4205f3c0689af4cffe68b79d4252e: He has a secret Black Knight training ground deep in the heart of Taverley dungeon, along with holding facilities for prisoners who they wish to interrogate later.
textByHash.61883618e11f86f6729828fc07059dc315cda6ef: No, it wasn't: Aggressiveness was highly increased, and there were numerous perceptual faults, hallucinations and the like.
textByHash.636d43c92c697b6a55bf496a07210167163f0f45: Well , bear in mind that it might just be an object that as in the vicinity rather than something he was carrying...
textByHash.64101507d02721b4312da5aade56cc1ea0085719: Still, no harm done I guess! Call me if you need me!
textByHash.65db3d6858f27fc194981626779635dc79b8adc8: Well, obviously it's not my real name!
textByHash.667e53f6d02972f3398438cfcc5de09cbf584a73: Well, wherever it is that you have seen them, I would guess he is nearby!
textByHash.66988fd121d61ec7d2ba19e7a7b14878a89bc30c: He is almost certain to be found thereabouts.
textByHash.66cecbe1cc3b277080a3818dca941d276d46ac18: Right, I think I've got it this time. Just one more second.
textByHash.673c1fcc04ab21553a2a112a471365c70021bc5e: Or... We have had a security leak within the Temple Knights and abandoned research has been sold to our enemies!
textByHash.6912538aeae473a01b1b61487a95f66d62194a97: Okay, so Daquarius told us he was probably somewhere with furry animals of some kind, and this mage has told us that he is East of here...
textByHash.691cb633b6f3fe23e9b740f4a87347c5baaa3e2c: Analysis is negative I'm afraid, Player. Savant out.
textByHash.6976dd46db2885242a98ef71ad4c8a3fce06d701: I don't think this can be the right place... Savant out.
textByHash.69f3e23ae7ebab83429be695da3bb4ed1a9c41be: I managed to shield you from most of his attack, and bring you back to Falador Castle, but you are lucky I was monitoring, that could have killed you!
textByHash.6bdeb94eae881effc6e11832b9a390ef5a26792e: Yes , you're right. But if he is using this 'slow-teleport' technique, then that means it is going to be a lot harder to catch him!
textByHash.6c74db9315e9e0314a214087e7476ce6f8314b57: Yes, it seems that centuries ago we discovered that a great evil had taken control of some of the most influential people in the world.
textByHash.6d58f10968f0ba99efca965bd410b23f0f443d6f: I am afraid that means for security reasons I can only give you a brief overview of the organisation...
textByHash.6f39a69eb522b1482b66df8421b415989ac72813: We suspect them to be the group responsible for destroying the Wizards Tower all of those years ago, as well as other more recent acts of sabotage.
textByHash.72a98c9cf6b47fa67953b4fa50273b85e12feac7: You shouldn't really waste my time like this...
textByHash.7371101bb23f6f62510d9bb143e6c6e3efcf56b0: GAH! This is infuriating! It's on the tip of my tongue...
textByHash.73ea4c1a16a6e10a364790cbfde6d5e7de909f5e: The markings on that door look familiar. Can you take a scan for me please?
textByHash.75e8879262c694b548465154d7b01217942436ad: You shouldn't really waste my time like this...
textByHash.788714ec107f936589297fd58c61acfbe8fc1c74: Now the best thing we could to is to repair or reinforce it before she escapes.
textByHash.792cf9571d9548161d2e3c2565dc48ea6a498356: Isn't that the same rock that you gave that Zamorakian mage in Varrock?
textByHash.799c2513bd2e2d9a67949af3734951722021c860: I'm not sure how much help in tracking him that is.
textByHash.79ecfbce69f6f5f6d3772ae55010aec4cb6fab61: I think the best thing you can do is take a look around Witchaven, speak to some of the locals and see if there are any clues to be found.
textByHash.7c1745a5dcaf466d464c9744c50f286e6791c560: We stopped the research as it was too dangerous to be practically useful, but our initial studies showed that we could use the entire dimension as a kind of scrying glass to see a precise point where we wished to teleport to, then teleport extremely slowly between two points.
textByHash.7e61412d14c57961d1827e1461513c67de6cbe4f: Well, for it to have got caught in his teleport, it must be a place where there are many around...
textByHash.7f707d0fbdff543a83bf7d97ca4602d37899ad9e: I am reading a huge power surge from Solus, be very careful...
textByHash.7f74497c27ae5b6f668490ed2feea7d62ad65f1a: Results are all-clear, Player. Savant out.
textByHash.8006a5be05a4247e1c8a4393287c1ebd006f3218: Oh yes, don't think for a second that we are the only secret organisation in Gielinor!
textByHash.832938ad2b1d1ec43cd8b9d8f3088ea346b58907: We set up an observation SpyOrb in a known Zamorakian shrine in south-east Varrock, but he moves between there and the wilderness just north of Edgeville quite frequently.
textByHash.83df33cd57d0a8e5e086c16deb0fd32918d382df: Oh my! I know what it is!
textByHash.84e0630eee6c39411725953d2fb9a21de8688b3c: Player, Solus is very weakened, and we don't have any more fighters to spare!
textByHash.86d28014803fd306e266e4db333b8d62285e686c: I will be able to shut his teleports down permanently in 2, perhaps 3, more scans...
textByHash.87113f14c00cf541bba1506b9cb5c0dc65e69e5f: I think we are on the final stretch now !
textByHash.880fb8af2bddbee82811f51025c14cde02c7fe1f: Okaaaaay... Bringing up your current assignment details...
textByHash.89cf58f1d382b438b08ab3f36b776955df7c1ad5: Well, if you know who or what they are, you should go and see them, Solus must be nearby!
textByHash.8aed113ca8be4507b42f6a4f3429586d5197d55b: From the look of the record, he would be worth talking to as well.
textByHash.8bc85c71aad5afb94a3a84e98c9a710972c54142: But the wisdom of Saradomin knew that such events might occur, and he laid plans in secret amongst his most devout followers!
textByHash.8cfe1f49fc9142b6a03258411c0af07e19ff9331: Let's see what we managed to snag in the scan this time!
textByHash.8eb8d91fe723780447a2d309d722ff44af7167f1: You really need to take care with this one. I'm amazed you got an assignment as tough as this one as a first assignment to be honest!
textByHash.903bc9ef0d8a20ff874722e72d777ae8ec47a7e5: Any ideas? Frankly, I'm stumped. I just don't have enough information to work out where he might be...
textByHash.90e1774b954c1808d51d8de283d31799a147b087: Let me tell you something, the mages who work there are idiots! They told me that magical research wasn't suitable for 'just a girl' and that I would be 'too scared' to research for them effectively!
textByHash.926e0997208ccee047a9c667da99402f4ea738de: But with Saradomin no longer with us, the Temple Knights were no longer honoured and respected by all!
textByHash.93ecffd9208c819882a364f5f9e80af4daba2b97: Very, though I can't shake the feeling that I've seen something like that before.
textByHash.963b9e9f43c4b98a3123632e2d4b4891062a22d4: Empty some space out of your pack and use the CommOrb to get a transcription of the glyphs.
textByHash.9860183f85a0727e3184fd731e62d2676da50049: I am monitoring your conversation through the CommOrb, his physiology shows none of the changes we usually get when someone lies to us.
textByHash.98881f350e1b9cfd3a0d7a2f39f638f71b3f6429: You could also move freely between the two invisibly and then choose which place you wished to end up, simply by concentrating on the location you wanted to appear in.

textByHash.99654e63e57c4e948779b9c4de9421aba2f29b9a: , I am getting some strange readings from this 'maiden'...

textByHash.9b0043b148c1f9936e2a43462dabc8c10efcb9c1: Well, hello! You must be ? Sir Tiffy told me to expect you to call in on this frequency!
textByHash.9b41272a05a7ab4c1a3bb1bbc47fea1147862dcc: Hmmm... These readings are very strange...
textByHash.9be849daadd3fffa455105b78657189eb45ed05a: You should probably take a minute to restock on supplies and heal up though .
textByHash.9c5542dedc652a98004ca00dbcb062cf53093449: Negative result, Player. Looks like you're barking up the wrong tree. Savant out.
textByHash.9ddd24b4797491ab95ea9fc9baf5ddb90593122a: Those warriors whose hearts were as pure as their minds were sharp were called to him, and were made into his Temple Knights, for they were the Knights that guarded his very first Temple.
textByHash.9e4f4cb89e63a8be3a058f4def8deae9b4026398: Either someone else has found this strange dimension and begun their own research, and reached the same conclusions that we did...
textByHash.a09ebf1a8ea05a56eb1f00c4a27e15ee6c6bee74: Can I finish now? Anyway, tell him you are working for Petmel Books.
textByHash.a14a541113b29786fa7c4843a48d881daac71552: Well, basically, you are stretched so thinly between dimensions that you effectively become invisible!
textByHash.a1eb83d2e6ecb22663fd911759382cdf8c3f2913: Well, it must be a place here there is a lot of it around for it to have been caught in his teleport...

textByHash.a57810e2c810295624812b3bdf927322b542dd07: Sorry , I should have spotted his little trick earlier...
textByHash.a604281bb02282914bece48b2d5579bd94df7702: My real name is Elyssa Van Lendes, but for operational purposes I am called Savant.
textByHash.a656e21393a311d72c612b2d2ccfba04fe884dad: I have added a transcript of the runes into your pack.
textByHash.a9a6787682da7787fd45b656c5b960e4f06ef989: I should have known he would try something like that!
textByHash.ad7d99ed5b9472cc10329ce41b97a8d280baf46a: Well, this CommOrb can use the scan function to find him, but its range is very limited.
textByHash.add22e813f522019d59b3e7401896c9682d16fc9: No, that would take far too long... Listen, I am going to transfer all information on Solus that we currently have to your CommOrb.
textByHash.adeddcaf950875fe66640e859b3422c6b907a683: Player? I've been monitoring you. He's telling the truth, so don't try to bluff him by starting a fight.

textByHash.af46bcae72dac69d5369ff8233d32dd51d8dc11d: Hello. What can I do for you?
textByHash.b157b20a09e3caef022560f81bca639751123d59: But then came the war, that shattered our lands, and the interloper banished our land from us!
textByHash.b31200e9e10b9ed809504dadbd3966742718f8b8: The man you need to see is called Jorral. You can find him in his tower north-west of Ardougne.
textByHash.b32d81c536d18b69ed7c70f56d8c121ebe84b97b: It shows that if you render the slug down, it will form a very sticky glue that will dry clear.
textByHash.b3d2fa8c4a909533739be4dbdf871803293af7c3: All of our records show that the only thing he will make a stand for is the protection of his men, and he has little regard for his own safety in comparison.
textByHash.b3e024cbbf43ed7a3f716a0b858d016ac24ea1a3: It stands for Senior Mystical Researcher. The Temple Knights have a world class research team investigating new types of magic constantly. As senior researcher, and liaison, I can pass on information to the rest of the Temple Knights.
textByHash.b5e8a8ccdaf5322b5bd9708688412e8989dff790: Yes, sadly there are many Zamorakians in these lands...But it must be somewhere of special significance...
textByHash.b77c3d08e94b3ee8ee2bb059037057a9e2fd8a41: Wow, that's some good thinking ! Okay, let's head there and get him!
textByHash.b869b1e3cf763252fef793d4eca5b39925b1e363: Well, this is not fur directly from an animal, look it has been prepared for sale...
textByHash.ba2e722b3a7f8341c0edf157c34ff2579877e0bc: Even if we wanted to let the ZMI have access to our research, the built in security magics would destroy it before trading anyway!
textByHash.bc4a61b8ae2abbbb6d6c045ce2fc628362da3a57: Okay, the smoke's cleared, and you don't seem to have been damaged by it!
textByHash.bc5b79be78ad6ec06477a2b3a08cc91b8c4539ce: No, but every time he escapes you I am shutting down his teleport to a specific area.
textByHash.bc999833ec78f03da13c650519a400aab10ed557: We ceased experimentation immediately, there are enough things in this world to haunt a Temple Knight, we did not see the need to create anymore.
textByHash.bd026721dac789a38dc32e846d57476c1d8fe8b8: Listen . Solus is an incredibly dangerous criminal, and I don't think his grasp on reality is too tight, if you understand what I'm saying.
textByHash.bd3b99acfe1291b963167a5f56b33ddbc9ee8f71: There was another item in the teleport with him...
textByHash.c028dc3aeac7690feafff38cdc5b1e584e355594: Hi , it sounds like a pretty good deal for this kind of information to me, but it's your call. We REALLY need to find Solus as soon as possible though, who knows what kind of damage he might cause now he is at large again!
textByHash.c04aa9ce14202932ec60b698b79ce223204ad007: But it is close enough to be a cause of concern.
textByHash.c40e1ead72ba48e66e70174f3485bed7989c2e6d: You should be able to find a hint of where to find him by examining it.
textByHash.c65d7746bdd4dcb6d9b45348cc1b59cd9281560f: Indeed. It seems this isn't the first time the Temple Knights have run across this Mother Mallum character.
textByHash.c76ba91d9fd38bb648e99bb25e7f06c4ff87cafe: I know we can find him and bring him to justice, but we don't want you dying while doing so!
textByHash.c81dbdee3b33063dcf98f883bee4455cb0e746a3: I think you'd better talk to Sir Tiffy about this.
textByHash.c93625454e434a80494f560867547be72e455ea0: Okay, I've blocked all exits from this place except for Temple Knight teleports...
textByHash.c99be24fbc4a74ab3ee3ec14b0a68c581ab5f967: Yes, he would seem a likely bet. Savant out.
textByHash.ca3223ebff5e3f0d6ec64cc6fb5dea54f3dbfce2: , I've been monitoring your conversation; You can't let him have Temple Knight equipment, he is a Zamorakian!
textByHash.caca12e4c13311a0f40820d8d59f14f0bf1e8e9b: She's blocking my magic! One second, I'll try something else.
textByHash.caedc347c44dace4884b597b9aa12e03d2b45d6b: Hey, we're all Temple Knights here, right? Glad I could help,
textByHash.cb7825ed4ce2a81a8e3a759b9e68fabb65ded8c2: You're not looking for Solus Player, you are supposed to be taking his hat to Sir Amik of the White Knights as proof that you have defeated him.
textByHash.cbad533508d3e7f511fdb634d3925c993c0c4916: It might give us a clue as to the second location Solus is in!
textByHash.cc284ad57157564c183ac642feccdd47c8fce3de: Hmm, I know a man who can translate them for us, just be careful as he's not a member of the Knights.
textByHash.ce88bb9f44f38a63a5d02f41727f8a3743123091: , are you there? We've been having a few technical problems...
textByHash.cfef0df8243faa8a6996fd1c04a810d83b580fee: Now that Solus is defeated you should take his hat to Sir Amik to prove that you were responsible.
textByHash.d0fe7ec3cfb97a385d8a73419660366e973c1ab9: No, I think he must be somewhere where there are a lot of people who wear eye patches...
textByHash.d1a44ce6d1e1138de92beba04c04e06d11d60ace: Well, it took the few remaining uncorrupted knights all their wit and strength to devise a method of removing sea slug possession.
textByHash.d1cad6117d8cc50a0f8f5b0ff365aa4c3b6aa829: I have heard rumours of giant frogs in a subterranean area...
textByHash.d2e16ad3e058edab48f6aa3df59dec01568d22d2: Many years ago the Temple Knights were studying teleportation techniques, and found a strange dimension that was accessed when teleporting..
textByHash.d2f5215ea12a12cc1cff4a8261f8bec29e20bc21: Thus it was that they became a secret force, hidden from the eyes of Saradomins enemies, that could strike against evil in his name swiftly and quietly whenever they may be needed.'
textByHash.d3d19ef568aacb647b725b099fb1dbae0d526318: You're right , I don't know how he is doing it...
textByHash.d66c3948e032d390b1259bee921651818b512cdc: Drat, I was hoping he wouldn't notice.
textByHash.d7b31525e7e0b2481f15675e769878c07b8285fc: He doesn't seem much of a threat, but we placed him under observation anyway, which seems to have paid off by getting some more information about Solus.
textByHash.d7f538dae5444fb897e4afa4dee11c33e294581a: I am the S.M.R. and Chief Librarian for the Temple Knights.
textByHash.d8688c24626a79aa363c396d9c1c646874154bde: , I am so glad you've been assigned this mission.
textByHash.d9960037f4bb5335b53d2831bfa543b14108e4ca: We have a front company who's keeping Jorral on retainer.
textByHash.dbfcd1f5e01b5079e4ce3ab228cd58be6e4975ca: Leave that to me and the Temple Knights .
textByHash.dc9555a747e0c2b037eb9719b6a2abc98a7f5af8: Are you okay? That looked like a nasty sucker punch...
textByHash.de1c1860711aa36e2d33f998aac9a9fbf4a0a076: I'm sorry , I should have stopped him using that spell...
textByHash.dfb3de70464b39ff06030a4fb9685b6ae920dec2: It's some kind of highly magically susceptible rock...
textByHash.dff7cc0ab9d1ebce82f4406d69797020835f1041: No. I am sorry that I let him hurt you like that...
textByHash.e04d8f12eee0899ba128aa5fdd9c898cfc2eb9a7: I have sent you a duplicate, try not to lose it.
textByHash.e413bb2171be4c394cc10e1742710f19bd5012db: Hello there Player. What can I help you with?
textByHash.e4c968728af5d57c0d2f3c74af8631565c5b17c0: Well, I might be able to retrieve it from the slow-teleport!
textByHash.e63e92cdc340e856cee54a93e7de3eb1aa2dd865: Okay, we have our scan results...
textByHash.e68cbb4bd2614b59e1d8948aec87e634aee92078: That was the final piece of the puzzle I needed.
textByHash.e6a4826be9226c0515e7d51363daa10d8204492c: I think it's more likely he happens to be in an area where there are many wizards around.
textByHash.e828f56a63f080328dc33bec429c3d51ae18afc1: Please don't use oil-rich swamp paste on an ancient parchment. It'll ruin it.
textByHash.e903fda11a31fa8419109cc2dc1c0e5321eaa4c0: There's... SOMETHING here... You know, I'm sure I've seen readings like this somewhere before...
textByHash.e90fdc706629e4f26959fdb81494696f0f7f908c: Keep up the chase ! We nearly have him cornered!
textByHash.eaf3a9918ae6016264141188a313ed711f1da082: Just give me a minute to cross reference the records in the Library. I know that I've seen readings like this before...
textByHash.eb9154378f63375ed109584e93dcb8d17c169d30: Rather, they were made targets by Saradomins enemies, and driven from the lands unjustly!
textByHash.efee31edfe4fe52a282802cf9b48b9ea7a1aea43: That's the spirit ! Just awaiting the data to come through...
textByHash.f1badc6342956cd62e42ec64f9de9b3becd6638d: No, I hit a brick wall after that. We had a dragon crash land on our headquarters a few years ago and the resulting fire destroyed a lot of our records.
textByHash.f50e35e0f497ac5ffbfb521991470710df865f9a: Many of the devices used by the Temple Knights such as our CommOrbs and SpyOrbs were first designed by my team as experimental devices, and have since become standard field equipment!
textByHash.f561156190b97487dacb016138d81f1b933e45eb: As a major enemy of the White Knights we have had him under observation for some time now, so it was pretty lucky that Solus decided to visit him.
textByHash.f572c0d13ce14917e854bba1099ca562b3cf0d22: Hello there . What can I help you with?
textByHash.f8603cbdeb2c1313a74bf011be6e0d4fc4bf3863: Calm yourself Player, he is telling the truth.
textByHash.f8e34c4420c4020c7ffae37b7181f3512194737d: Ok Player, I'm going to begin a low level scan for Solus now...
textByHash.fac59505e2298ba2e9dddbf0ba6e4a4d8d4210ba: Exactly. Listen, I might be able to block his teleportation magics using your CommOrb, but I will need you to get close to him, and if we're unlucky then he will end up teleporting to the point away from you instead of appearing in front of you
textByHash.fd35f45089cf68a911d2d45b26a3ed22aa49efc3: Oh, trust me you'll find out exactly how useful! Now, was there something you wanted?
textByHash.fdbdb2d04771cdd40daa0296f17d4182865597fe: He has a very good track record in translation of ancient runes.
